source_anchor: Male testosterone varies over time and low values need confirmation.
tool_behavior: Show one-measurement context warning; do not diagnose.

source_anchor: CDC hormone standardization programs assess analytical accuracy and reliability of testosterone and estradiol tests.
tool_behavior: Store assay method if known; warn when unknown.

source_anchor: Commercial estradiol assays can be poor at low male levels.
tool_behavior: Flag male and postmenopausal estradiol as assay-sensitive.
source_locator: Diagnostic Aspects: Significance of Serum Estradiol in Men

source_anchor: DHT assay needs negligible testosterone cross-reactivity and LC-MS methods are used by reference laboratories.
tool_behavior: Ask method if known and lower confidence when unknown.

source_anchor: Equilibrium dialysis, calculated free testosterone, and analog free testosterone are not interchangeable.
tool_behavior: Reject analog free T as a curated comparator until separately approved.
source_locator: Calculated Free Testosterone and Direct Free Testosterone sections

source_anchor: Calculated free testosterone can track equilibrium dialysis under many conditions but analog free T and free androgen index vary with SHBG.
tool_behavior: Keep calculated free T method-labeled and separate from measured equilibrium-dialysis rows.

source_anchor: Fit Futures notes limited cross-laboratory standardization and preanalytic vulnerabilities for 11-oxygenated androgen assays.
tool_behavior: Treat 11-OA rows as source-specific method rows rather than universal harmonized bands.

source_anchor: Kushnir established DHEA intervals by LC-MS/MS but the source does not solve DHEA diurnal timing variability.
tool_behavior: Keep DHEA rows source-specific and warn that timing affects interpretation.

source_anchor: Fabregat reports ELISA results about 43% higher than the LC-MS/MS method for serum 3-alpha androstanediol glucuronide.
tool_behavior: Keep 3-alpha-diol-G rows method-labeled and do not mix immunoassay and LC-MS/MS ranges.

source_anchor: Liu 2026 backdoor-pathway steroid intervals are plasma UPLC-MS/MS rows from healthy Han Chinese adults age 20-60.
tool_behavior: Treat androsterone, 3-alpha-diol, and Liu DHT rows as source-specific advanced context.

source_anchor: Holmes 2021 pediatric intervals are continuous quantile-regression point estimates by age bin, not fixed diagnostic partitions.
tool_behavior: Display as source-specific pediatric rows with age-bin midpoint and method caveats.

source_anchor: Liu 2026 intervals are from reproductive-age women in Guangxi, China after PCOS exclusion.
tool_behavior: Display as population-specific adrenal-steroid rows rather than universal intervals.

source_anchor: Frederiksen 2024 models sex- and age-specific steroid reference profiles in main Figures 2-3; the supplement contains method tables and log-profile figures, not a clean numeric RI grid.
tool_behavior: Use Table 1 and Supplementary Tables 6-8 for assay/censoring caveats; do not promote exact age-sex interval rows from figures without a numeric table or author-supplied data.
source_locator: Main Table 1, Figures 2-3; Supplementary Tables 1-8 and Supplementary Figures 4-5
